evidence_summary: A multi-day training montage documenting the transition of john_carter from an outsider to a proficient Zodangan air scout. The sequence must visually communicate technical mastery of eighth-ray propulsion and Martian aviation through repetitive, escalating...

Under the alias "John Carter," facilitated by Kantos Kan, Carter undergoes training as a Zodangan air scout. He spends several days mastering Martian aviation and the mechanics of the eighth-ray propulsion systems.
